verification_notes: Vision-verified bound spirit limits (p.136), Trance rank abilities (p.131-132), and Binding skill (p.132) against Mythras Core PDF page images. CHA/2 for Spirit Worshipper confirmed on p.136 under 'Limits to Bound Spirits'.

trance.description: Represents the animist's awareness of the Spirit World and ability to move between it and the material world. Range equals POW in metres.

rank_abilities.follower: Can observe and identify spirits within range, using natural senses
rank_abilities.spirit_worshipper: Can converse with spirits within range, via empathic communication
rank_abilities.shaman: Can project their own soul onto the Spirit Plane. Can draw a spirit into the material world or expel a spirit possessing someone
rank_abilities.high_shaman: Can drag the soul of another person into the Spirit World

binding.description: The skill used by animists to induce or force a spirit to perform to his will. Used to summon, dominate, and bind spirits in spirit combat.

aig_adaptation.note: Per Hannu (2026-05-16): 'For animism replaced binding with spirit rune affinity'. In AiG/Glorantha, the Spirit Rune affinity replaces both Trance and Binding. Spirit Rune allows seeing/communicating with spirits (replaces Trance) and commanding spirits uses the Rune Affinity shared with the spirit (replaces Binding).
aig_adaptation.binding_replacement: Spirit Rune affinity (for commanding spirits, use the Rune Affinity shared with the spirit)
aig_adaptation.trance_replacement: Spirit Rune affinity (for perceiving and entering the Spirit World)
aig_adaptation.source: AiG p.134 (Spirit Magic chapter), Hannu Discord 2026-05-16

follower.description: Pays lip service to the tradition's spirits to propitiate them

spirit_worshipper.description: Undertakes the dangerous path of directly interacting with spirits

shaman.description: Can project soul onto Spirit Plane, draw spirits into material world

high_shaman.description: Can drag souls of others into the Spirit World

starting_rank_at_chargen.note: Per Mythras Core p.34: 'No higher than Common Member at character creation'. For animism, this maps to Spirit Worshipper (equivalent to Initiate in theist cults).

spirit_intensity_table.description: Spirit Intensity determines POW range. Intensity 6+ spirits are beyond the control of a lone animist.

spirit_characteristics.int_or_ins: Reflects level of intellect when alive or corresponding physical creature
spirit_characteristics.cha: Force of the spirit's personality, varies by type

fetish_rules.description: A ceremonial object that embodies magical power. Any item can become a fetish.
fetish_rules.creation_cost: 1 Experience Roll per point of Intensity of the spirit
fetish_rules.protection: Whilst confined within its fetish a spirit cannot be harmed by hostile magic or other spirits; it remains in stasis
fetish_rules.activation: Spirit must be called from the fetish to serve the holder. Spirit can travel up to its POW in metres from the fetish.
fetish_rules.upgrade_cost: Difference in Experience Rolls between old and new Intensity

types.name: Nature Spirits (Animal)
abilities: One or more of: Bless, Demesne, Domination, Endowment
types.description: Entities of the world's natural flora and fauna. Frequently the subject of totemic veneration.

types.name: Nature Spirits (Regional)
abilities: One or more of: Bless, Demesne, Domination, Endowment
types.description: Spirits of places - groves, springs, mountains.

types.name: Ancestor Spirits
abilities: plus one or more of: Discorporate, Sagacity, Spellcasting, Subjugate
types.description: Souls of family members who reside in the Spirit World after death.

types.name: Bane Spirits
types.description: Spirits that inflict curses and misfortune.

types.name: Death Spirits
types.description: Spirits that can kill or drain life force.

types.name: Disease Spirits
types.description: Spirits that carry and inflict diseases.

types.name: Elemental Spirits
types.description: Spirits of the classical elements that can manifest physically.

types.name: Fetches
abilities: Personal guardian spirit bonded to a shaman
types.description: A shaman's personal spirit companion, gained during initiation.

types.name: Guardian Spirits
types.description: Spirits that guard and protect their binder.

types.name: Healing/Medicine Spirits
types.description: Spirits that can cure disease and heal wounds.

types.name: Passion Spirits
abilities: Invoke overwhelming passions or mental states
types.description: Spirits that can induce love, fear, hate, madness, violence, etc.

types.name: Predator Spirits
types.description: Aggressive spirits that can physically harm targets.

types.name: Shape-shifting Spirits
abilities: Grant ability to change form into cult totem animal
types.description: Spirits that allow the animist to take animal form.

types.name: Sickness Spirits
types.description: Spirits that cause ongoing illness rather than acute disease.

spirit_abilities_list.note: Each spirit has one or more abilities based on its type and Intensity. Abilities requiring possession need the spirit to first win Spirit Combat.

spirit_combat.description: Resolved similarly to physical combat but uses Spectral Combat skill (50%+POW+CHA). Damage reduces Magic Points. At 0 MP, the loser is at the mercy of the victor.
